query:
SELECT id, name, 
  JSON_KEYS(JSON_EXTRACT(briefingStructured, '$')) as json_keys,
  JSON_EXTRACT(briefingStructured, '$.inconsistencias') as inconsistencias,
  JSON_EXTRACT(briefingStructured, '$.confidence_score') as confidence_score
FROM projects 
WHERE id = 60128;
